# Transcrição: 40. Trait 39 - Great Salespeople are devoted to being in great physical, emotional and spiritual condition.

- **Fonte:** 40. Trait 39 - Great Salespeople are devoted to being in great physical, emotional and spiritual condition.
- **Duração:** 01:02
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:02]

The great salespeople are devoted to being in great physical, emotional, mental, and spiritual condition. The greats get it all right. They're not interested in having three of those right and one out. They want lots of energy. They know they're mental, they're emotional, they're physical. All of that matters. They want to be in the best shape they can be in every way possible. Look, you can't be great if you don't have them all together. There's no reason to settle. There's no reason to have the physical in and the emotional out. How's that going to work? Okay? Oh, the guy's in great shape, but he's a whack job. Okay? There's no reason to have the physical out and have all the other pieces in. Look, have it all, man. Find time for it all. But, man, I don't have enough time. You got the same 168 hours everybody's got. Physical, emotional, mental, spiritual, okay? Familiarial. Get them all right. Be great. Okay? Otherwise, why do you want to be great at just selling or building a business? Be great at it all, okay? And you can't be great if you don't have it all.
